summary: The available literature indicates that while advanced devices like CGMs provide essential real-time insights into blood sugar trends, improvements in glycemic control depend critically on patient education, behavioral adaptation, and ongoing clinician oversight—factors beyond what any standalone technology can deliver independently. Thus, no study supports the notion that technology itself suffices to enhance glycaemic outcomes without these foundational human-based interventions.

Thus, no study supports the notion that technology itself suffices to enhance glycaemic outcomes without these foundational human-based interventions.. Answer choice: B
